description_long: This sculpture depicts a dynamic scene featuring a human figure mounted on a rearing horse, with another animal, likely a dog, positioned at the base. The figures are arranged around a central, vertical tree trunk that serves as a structural and compositional anchor. The human figure appears to be in motion, possibly engaged in a hunt or dramatic action, with one arm extended and the other holding the horse's reins. The horse is sculpted in a lively pose, with raised forelegs and a sense of movement. The base is rectangular and solid, providing stability to the vertical composition. The entire piece is rendered in a stone-like material, with a weathered, matte finish and subtle variations in tone.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a human figure on a rearing horse, accompanied by a dog and anchored by a central tree trunk, all set on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the human figure seated on the horse, with the tree trunk rising behind and the dog visible at the base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the horse and the tree trunk, with the dynamic pose of the horse most prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the human figure's profile and the dog at the base, with the tree trunk in the background.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the full scene: the human figure on the horse, the dog at the base, and the tree trunk unifying the composition.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure on horseback with a dog and tree trunk
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture is shown isolated on a plain background.
